message:
✨ Add CoreWeave as recognized cluster vendor (#1085)

Detect CoreWeave clusters by name pattern and .coreweave.com URL.
Adds branded icon (blue gradient with wave mark), color scheme (#2741E7),
provider info, console URL, and i18n translation.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

(serverUrl.includes('openshift.com') || serverUrl.includes('openshiftapps.com') || serverUrl.includes('.openshift.')) { return 'openshift'
